zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Boleyn於1438年出生在英國諾福爾可布利可林時，她的父親Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II32歲，母親Anne Elizabeth Hoo-9歲。她於1463年之後與John Fortescue the Younger在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她於1470年住在英國英格蘭諾福爾可。她去世於1485年4月23日在英國諾福爾可艾爾善姆享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Boleyn于1438年出生在英国諾福爾可布利可林时，她的父亲Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II32岁，母亲Anne Elizabeth Hoo-9岁。她于1463年之后与John Fortescue the Younger在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她于1470年住在英国英格兰諾福爾可。她去世于1485年4月23日在英国諾福爾可艾爾善姆享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 邁克爾。

nameMeanings.name: Boleyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Bullen  .
Flemish: derivative of the personal name Bol, from Baldwin .

variants.name: Bullen
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from the French Channel port of Boulogne, recorded in Latin sources both as Gessoriacum and as Bononia. The latter name is clearly the source of the modern placename. It is ostensibly a derivative of Latin bonus ‘good’ (compare Bolognese ), but may in fact come from a Gaulish element bona ‘foundation’. Boulogne has long been a major trading port between England and France.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Boleyn was born in 1438, in Blickling, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II, was 32 and her mother, Anne Elizabeth Hoo, was -9. She married John Fortescue the Younger after 1463, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She lived in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom in 1470. She died on 23 April 1485, in Aylsham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Boleyn est née en 1438, à Blickling, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anne Elizabeth Hoo, avait -9 ans. Elle a épousé John Fortescue the Younger après 1463, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle a vécu à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1470. Elle est décédée le 23 avril 1485, à Aylsham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat nach 1463 in Norfolk, England John Fortescue the Younger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1470 hat sie in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb am 23. April 1485 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Aylsham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato John Fortescue the Younger dopo il 1463, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1470. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Boleynが1438年にイギリスノーフォルクブリックリングで生まれた時，父Sir Geoffrey Boleyn IIは32歳，母Anne Elizabeth Hooは-9歳であった。1463年以後にイギリスノーフォルクでJohn Fortescue the Youngerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1470年にはイギリスイギリスノーフォルクに住んでいた。彼女は1485年4月23日にイギリスノーフォルクエイルシャムで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクオルメスビー スト ミチャエルにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby, Norfol: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Boleyn(이)가 1438년 영국 노르폴크 블릭링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Elizabeth Hoo(은)는 -9세였다. 그녀는 1463년 이후 영국 노르폴크에서 John Fortescue the Younger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1470년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 살았다. 그녀는 1485년 4월 23일 영국 노르폴크 아이샤에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Boleyn nasceu em 1438, em Blickling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anne Elizabeth Hoo, tinha -9 anos. Ela casou-se com John Fortescue the Younger após 1463, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela viveu em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1470. Ela faleceu em 23 de abril de 1485, em Aylsham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Margaret Churchyard, Ormesby, Norfol: ормесби ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Boleyn родилась в 1438 г. в местности бликклинг, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey Boleyn II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Elizabeth Hoo, -9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Fortescue the Younger после 1463 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она жила в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в 1470 году. Она умерла 23 апреля 1485 г. в местности аилшам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности ормесби ст мачаел, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con John Fortescue the Younger después de 1463, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1470.
